column5: The source defines demagnetization coefficient as one minus post-field recoil flux density divided by initial residual flux density and reports the spatial maximum in the optimized motor as 1.654 percent at 20 degC and 22.396 percent at -40 degC. These are application-model outputs under a maximum modeled stator field of 256.49 kA/m, not intrinsic Y30 material allowables. Figure 13 plots the input B-H curves but supplies no tabulated points.
